title: More Automatons for Mirror Columns with links from multiple boards

posts.author: gchristensen (Greg Christensen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a scenario where I would like to be able to perform different actions when a Status changes.
The Status is a mirror column on a summary board. The status is mirrored from multiple other boards.
Current automations seem to limit function to only one connected board.

I am hoping to either move an item to a different group or set another board status based on the mirrored column.
